name: Medal of Honor: Pacific Assault
post_apply_message:
Medal of Honor: Pacific Assault (2004, GOG, DRM-free) — Apply adds the Steam shortcut on GE-Proton 10.34 pointing at mohpa.exe (NOT DSLauncher.exe, which is just a front-end).

WIDESCREEN — NEEDS ONE MANUAL STEP (for now). Unlike Allied Assault, this game writes its config in the PREFIX on first run, not the game folder, so the tool can't set it before you've launched once. Steps:
1. Launch the game once (it'll be 4:3 — that's fine, it just needs to create the config), then quit.
2. Edit newconfig.cfg inside the Proton prefix at:
   compatdata/<appid>/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/Documents/EA Games/Medal of Honor Pacific Assault(tm)/newconfig.cfg
   set  r_screenwidth  "1280"
   set  r_screenheight "800"
   set  r_first_person_fov_x "70"
   set  r_first_person_fov_y "50"
(the file uses set "quoted" values, not ini key=value — that's why it isn't an automated ini_edit.)

Tell me once you've launched it and I'll wire up an automated prefix-config step against the real path.

CONTROLLER: no native pad support — use a Steam Input keyboard/mouse layout.
notes: Built 2026-07-21 from Tony's GOG copy at NAS _games/'Medal of Honor - Pacific Assault' (goggame markers — DRM-free, delisted). Launch target is mohpa.exe (9.3MB); DSLauncher.exe is a launcher front-end, language_setup.exe/mohpa_setup.exe are installers. Widescreen config is Documents/EA Games/Medal of Honor Pacific Assault(tm)/newconfig.cfg — generated in the PREFIX on first run (nothing on disk to edit yet), and it's `set key "value"` format, not ini, so ini_edit can't touch it. Deliberately shipped as shortcut-only + documented manual step until the prefix path is confirmed on hardware; then add a config-edit step (or a copy_files of a prepared newconfig.cfg) keyed on {prefix}. There's also a community 'MedalFixer' widescreen package and a mohpa.exe hex-edit for FOV — not used (won't patch the game binary). Non-Steam -> computed appid. UNTESTED.
